native_key_get.description:
`true` if `memory/get` is O(1) exact-key. Zep: `false`
(search-based fallback).

native_ttl.description:
`true` if the backend natively honors `ttl_secs`. Zep: `false`.
SQLite-backed: `true`.

strong_consistency.description: `true` if put → query is immediately consistent. Zep: `false`.
